productDisplayName: Puma Women Jersey Black Track Pant
description: Composition Black track pants made of 95% cotton and 5% elastane, with a broad elasticated waistband and drawstring woven through two loops and embroidered brand name on the left side Fitting Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash with lukewarm water Do not bleach, tumble dry or dry clean Warm iron; Do not iron on decorations Soft on the inside and sporty on the outside, these pants from puma make a great addition to your casual wardrobe. Crafted from a cotton/elastane blend, these pants are ideal for your Sports training, jogging sessions or just laid back weekends. The sporty look does wonders for your casual style and the soft fabric keeps you extremely comfortable. Pair this with a sporty T-shirt and running shoes. Model Statistics Model is a size M of height 6' and waist 28"
